12 Haiden Evans

12 Haiden Evans

  • Position:
    Forward
  • Height:
    6-7
  • Weight:
    175
  • Class:
    Redshirt Freshman
  • Hometown:
    Atlanta, GA
  • High School:
    Midtown
  • Summary
  • Media
  • Season
  • Career
  • Historical

Summary

Biography

Personal/High School: Graphic design major... led team in made three pointers in junior and senior seasons at Midtown HS... team captain in basketball and baseball... led school's graphic design team... additionally ran school's athletic Instagram and X pages... totaled 75+ hours of community service... son of Will and Allison Evans... two siblings, Annie Evans and Jaxon Reynolds.
No stats available for the current season.
